refined_caption: The nursing station is empty and unstaffed, with no medical personnel present. The waiting room has chairs but appears to be unattended.
complaint_description: I visited the hospital and was surprised to find the nursing station completely empty and unstaffed. I was expecting to receive assistance or guidance, but there was no one available to help. This lack of staffing is concerning and affects the quality of care.
voice_text: I just got to the hospital and the nursing station is totally empty, there's no one here to help.
